description: Read-only MCP server for exposing database schema metadata without row data.
name: io.github.Siddharth-coder13/secure-schema

environmentVariables.description: SQLAlchemy database URL used for schema inspection.
environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional default schema or catalog namespace. In production it is locked and tool arguments cannot override it.
environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_SCHEMA

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated table/view allowlist. When set, only listed tables and views are visible.
environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_TABLES

environmentVariables.description: Set to production to require ALLOWED_TABLES during startup.
environmentVariables.name: SECURE_SCHEMA_ENV

environmentVariables.description: Set to off to disable FastMCP startup update checks.
environmentVariables.name: FASTMCP_CHECK_FOR_UPDATES

environmentVariables.description: Set to false to suppress the FastMCP startup banner.
environmentVariables.name: FASTMCP_SHOW_SERVER_BANNER

title: Secure Schema MCP
